mapper.select: SELECT id, instance_id, node_id, node_type, node_name, status, input_data, output_data, node_config_snapshot, retry_count, max_retries, executor_type, executor_ref, error_message, error_stack, started_at, completed_at, duration_ms FROM workflow_node_log WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO workflow_node_log (instance_id, node_id, node_type, node_name, status, input_data, output_data, node_config_snapshot, retry_count, max_retries, executor_type, executor_ref, error_message, error_stack, started_at, completed_at, duration_ms) VALUES (#{instanceId}, #{nodeId}, #{nodeType}, #{nodeName}, #{status}, #{inputData}, #{outputData}, #{nodeConfigSnapshot}, #{retryCount}, #{maxRetries}, #{executorType}, #{executorRef}, #{errorMessage}, #{errorStack}, #{startedAt}, #{completedAt}, #{durationMs})
